title: shadcn composition baseline
summary: Prefer composable shadcn primitives over custom one-off widgets when building new internal product surfaces.
when_to_use: A new screen can be assembled from existing primitives with minor styling work.
The implementation should stay aligned with the repository stack defaults.
constraints: Do not create bespoke UI components when a primitive composition solves the same problem cleanly.
Keep styling localized so future screens can reuse the pattern.
solution_outline: Start with Card, Tabs, Table, Dialog, Sheet, and form primitives before inventing new abstractions.
Extract a reusable wrapper only after two concrete usages exist.
Keep behavior code separate from cosmetic wrappers.
